subcodes.first_line: The Nightingale of Eternity, perched upon the branches of the Divine Lote-Tree, doth at all times proclaim these words: O friends, cherish ye the days of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عندلیب بقا بر افنان سدره منتهی در کل احیان باین بیان ناطق ای دوستان قدر ایام رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action
